requirement_topic.en: ASN Standards Route and IEC 61851 EVSE Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: ASN 标准路径与 IEC 61851 充电设备基线
requirement_topic.zht: ASN 標準路徑與 IEC 61851 充電設備基線

summary.en: Senegalese EV charger projects should confirm whether ASN has adopted, referenced, or accepted an IEC-route standard for the charger scope, and whether the buyer, tender, customs route, or installer requires IEC 61851 evidence. IEC 61851-1:2017 covers EV supply equipment characteristics, EVSE-to-EV connection, and electrical safety for EV supply equipment up to 1 000 V AC or 1 500 V DC input limits stated by IEC.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔充电桩项目应确认 ASN 是否已对充电设备范围采纳、引用或接受 IEC 路径标准，以及买方、招标、海关路径或安装方是否要求 IEC 61851 证据。IEC 61851-1:2017 涵盖充电设备特性、充电设备与电动汽车连接以及充电设备电气安全，适用于 IEC 所述最高 1 000 V AC 或 1 500 V DC 输入范围。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾充電樁項目應確認 ASN 是否已對充電設備範圍採納、引用或接受 IEC 路徑標準，以及買方、招標、海關路徑或安裝方是否要求 IEC 61851 證據。IEC 61851-1:2017 涵蓋充電設備特性、充電設備與電動汽車連接以及充電設備電氣安全，適用於 IEC 所述最高 1 000 V AC 或 1 500 V DC 輸入範圍。

standards_or_laws: ASN Senegal national standards route where adopted or required

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 18487.1 for conductive charging-system requirements together with GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging. These documents can support a Senegal technical file only after clause mapping, edition comparison, and export-configuration checks against IEC 61851 and any ASN, tender, or owner requirement.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据 GB/T 18487.1 管理传导式充电系统要求，并配套 GB/T 20234 连接装置标准和 GB/T 27930 直流充电通信。只有在完成条款映射、版本比对并按 IEC 61851 及任何 ASN、招标或业主要求核查出口配置后，这些文件才可支持塞内加尔技术文件。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據 GB/T 18487.1 管理傳導式充電系統要求，並配套 GB/T 20234 連接裝置標準和 GB/T 27930 直流充電通信。只有在完成條款映射、版本比對並按 IEC 61851 及任何 ASN、招標或業主要求核查出口配置後，這些文件才可支持塞內加爾技術文件。

gap.en: Do not state that a China GB/T test report is equivalent to Senegal acceptance unless the exact charger variant, protection functions, EMC evidence, connector interface, language/marking, and installation assumptions are mapped to the target route and accepted by the Senegal buyer or authority.
gap.zh: 除非具体充电桩型号、保护功能、EMC证据、连接器接口、语言/标识和安装假设已映射到目标路径并获塞内加尔买方或主管方接受，不应声称中国 GB/T 测试报告等同于塞内加尔接受。
gap.zht: 除非具體充電樁型號、保護功能、EMC證據、連接器介面、語言／標識和安裝假設已映射到目標路徑並獲塞內加爾買方或主管方接受，不應聲稱中國 GB/T 測試報告等同於塞內加爾接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where Senegal law, ASN adoption, customs conformity route, tender, buyer specification, utility/site approval, or project-owner documents require IEC 61851 or an ASN-adopted equivalent
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T evidence is mandatory or expected for China-market conformity depending on the product route; it is supporting evidence only for Senegal unless accepted by the target route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 as the target technical baseline only when ASN, a tender, customs route, buyer, Senelec, or project owner makes it applicable. GB/T 18487 evidence should be mapped, not renamed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 只有在 ASN、招标、海关路径、买方、Senelec 或项目业主使其适用时，才应将 IEC 61851 作为目标技术基线。GB/T 18487 证据应进行映射，而不是改名替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 只有在 ASN、招標、海關路徑、買方、Senelec 或項目業主使其適用時，才應將 IEC 61851 作為目標技術基線。GB/T 18487 證據應進行映射，而不是改名替代。
